decision: Combine PR20 (ai-coding tabs/sessions) + PR27 (deploy infra) onto branch 2fix off main; fix all 8 Copilot review comments.
rationale: PR27 settings.ts + .gitignore changes already superseded by main (gsd default/migration present; main has comprehensive .gitignore). Brought in only PR27's net-new deploy files. PR20 cherry-picked clean.
fixes: Tightened AI-session container matching to ^daax-[0-9a-f]{8}$ via shared lib/ai-session-name.ts in list/kill/reap routes so daax-code-server etc. cannot be surfaced or force-removed
Dragover reorder: position-aware midpoint guard + toIdx===fromIdx no-op to stop oscillation (preserves live preview vs move-on-drop)
deploy-local.sh: pass HOME_MCP_JSON_PATH un-normalized so compose ${VAR:+} stays empty when unset (restores /workspace .mcp.json fallback)
deploy-local.sh: corrected misleading 'idempotent no-op' header (deploy always --force-recreate)
validation: Producer Claude Opus 4.7; validator Codex GPT-5.5 (pending). typecheck/lint pre-existing failures on main only (testcontainers modules + 11 unrelated lint errors + 3 backlog tests) confirmed via worktree; zero new issues from this change.
